test_client.cpp File Reference
#include "xmlrpcpp/XmlRpcClient.h"
#include "xmlrpcpp/XmlRpcValue.h"
#include "mock_socket.h"
#include <errno.h>
#include <climits>
#include <gtest/gtest.h>
